description_long: This object is a detailed model of a red crab, featuring a robust, slightly flattened cephalothorax with a smooth, matte surface and subtle dark markings. The crab has two prominent claws, with the right claw being significantly larger and more elongated than the left, both showing a slightly rougher texture and darker tips. Its eight segmented walking legs are slender, jointed, and curve outward, displaying a gradient of red to dark brown at the extremities. Two black, stalked eyes protrude from the top of the cephalothorax, giving the crab a vigilant appearance. The overall coloration is a vibrant red with patches of darker hues, suggesting natural wear or environmental exposure. The anatomical details, such as the segmentation and articulation of the limbs, are well-defined, making it visually realistic and suitable for urban food or seafood market scenes.
description: A vibrant red crab with a large right claw, slender jointed legs, and black stalked eyes, featuring realistic surface details and dark markings. The model is visually striking and anatomically accurate.
description_view_0: Front view showing the broad cephalothorax, both claws (with the right claw larger), and the stalked eyes facing forward.
description_view_1: Right-front angled view highlighting the pronounced size difference between the claws and the curvature of the right-side legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the symmetrical arrangement of the legs and the dorsal surface of the claws, with both eye stalks visible.
description_view_3: Left-rear angled view emphasizing the smaller left claw and the articulation of the left-side legs.
